title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Shutenmaru as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In order to rescue Kuma, the commanders of the Revo- Lutionary Army...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Finally flashed with Marine Admirals RYokugyu and Fujitora!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A bunch of hot-blooded brats are gathering on that island (!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With the enraged Emperor, big mom, in hot pursuit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you think will happen!!? It's already started.....!!! The bloodbath between the powerful in the fight for the throne!!! Zethahaha!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm glad that it was only a shallow wound!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was really scared and lost conscious- mess instantly... so I don't really remember what happened.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I vaguely remember Umami- chan fighting desperately afterwards, though.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think an enemy like that would become your faithful servant... what an amazing ability you possess.

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 24 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
